tools.name: get_all_status
tools.description: Get real-time status for all AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI). Returns overall health, component status and active incidents.

tools.name: get_provider_status
tools.description: Get real-time status for a single AI provider.

tools.name: get_incidents
tools.description: Get active incidents across all AI providers. Optionally filter by provider.
